LLR_PORT_VALID_STATIC.desc: Valid LLR_PORT entry with static mode.

LLR_PORT_VALID_WITH_PROFILE.desc: Valid LLR_PORT entry referencing a user-defined LLR profile.

LLR_PORT_INVALID_LLR_LOCAL.desc: Invalid llr_local value (not in admin_mode enum).

LLR_PORT_INVALID_LLR_REMOTE.desc: Invalid llr_remote value (not in admin_mode enum).
